data.title: Meta, AMD, Apple, AT&T Among Biggest US Tech Giants That 'May Suffer The Most' As Tariffs Spark Trade Turmoil: Here's Why
data.description: Tariffs could heavily impact top tech beneficiaries of globalization as the cost of the goods sold by these firms may rise.

data.title: Peter Thiel-Backed Nonprofit Sentient Aims To Be America's DeepSeek, Takes Aim At Closed AI Systems
data.description: Sentient, a Peter Thiel-backed nonprofit, has launched its open-source AI search framework, Open Deep Search (ODS), positioning it as America's response to China's DeepSeek and its challenge to the dominance of closed-source AI systems.

data.title: Trump's 'Liberation Day' Tariffs Roil Markets As China Slams 'Typical Unilateral Bullying:' Asian Markets Plunge
data.description: Global markets reeled on Thursday after Trump unveiled sweeping new tariffs on imports, with China threatening countermeasures.

data.title: Dogecoin Dropped 16% In A Week, Time To Grab Some? Analyst Says Meme King At A 'Make-Or-Break' Level
data.description: Popular dog-themed cryptocurrency Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) fell Wednesday after President Donald Trump's tariff shock, extending its weekly losses to over 16%.

data.title: UFC Picks Mark Zuckerberg's Meta As Official Technology Partner, Joins Forces To Revolutionize Fan Engagement: 'Smart Glasses Could Be The Next Computing Platform'
data.description: The Ultimate Fighting Championship (UFC), a subsidiary of TKO Group Holdings (NYSE: TKO), has entered into a multiyear partnership with tech giant Meta to transform fan engagement using Meta's advanced technology.
